blended.narrative: Mount Sunapee is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 59°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
